chunks.title: Introduction to Pharaoh
chunks.reason: Sets the date and introduces the speaker addressing Pharaoh.

chunks.title: The Parable of the Cedar
chunks.reason: Describes the rise and fall of Assyria as a great cedar tree.

chunks.title: The Cedar's Descent to Sheol
chunks.reason: Describes the cosmic mourning and descent of the tree into the underworld.

chunks.title: Application to Pharaoh
chunks.reason: Concludes the parable by applying the lesson directly to Pharaoh and his army.
